era: Punk Pop. E=6 -- feminist supergroup. Raw, fast, confrontational. Hardly Art streak completes (201-204). v1.49.345.

location.formative: Capitol Hill feminist punk network. Supergroup from Chastity Belt (201), Tacocat (203), Pony Time.
location.career: Childbirth. 2013-present. Hardly Art. Feminist punk supergroup.

members.name: Julia Shapiro
members.note: From Chastity Belt (201). Louder, more direct here. Restraint loosens.

members.name: Bree McKenna
members.note: From Tacocat (203). More aggressive here. Network bridge.

members.name: Stacy Peck
members.note: From Pony Time. Aggressive, driving. The engine.

associated_musicians.name: Chastity Belt
associated_musicians.note: Shapiro's primary band. Hardly Art (201). Deadpan irony.

associated_musicians.name: Tacocat
associated_musicians.note: McKenna's primary band. Hardly Art (203). Pop-punk humor.

theory_nodes.concept: Hardly Art streak completes (201-204) -- four entries, one label, one story. Energy arc: 4-5-6-6. Genre arc: indie-surf-punk-punk. Feminist continuity: irony-melancholy-humor-confrontation.
theory_nodes.description: Hardly Art streak complete. Four entries. Energy 4-5-6-6. Four feminist modes.

genealogy.relationship: Childbirth at 204. Streak completes. Network closes.

theory_nodes.concept: Supergroup as scene maturity marker -- when a scene produces supergroups, the scene is mature. Temple of the Dog was grunge's marker. Childbirth is the feminist punk marker.
examples: Temple of the Dog: Soundgarden + Pearl Jam.
Mad Season: Alice in Chains + Pearl Jam + Screaming Trees.
Childbirth: Chastity Belt + Tacocat + Pony Time.
theory_nodes.description: Supergroup as scene maturity. Feminist punk equivalent of grunge supergroups.

genealogy.relationship: Childbirth at 204. Capitol Hill feminist network's supergroup.

theory_nodes.concept: Member overlap closure -- Shapiro (201) + McKenna (203) = Childbirth (204). The network loop closes. Geography and values become shared DNA.
examples: Three bands converge in one supergroup.
theory_nodes.description: Member overlap closure. Three source bands. One supergroup. Network DNA exposed.

cross_references.relationship: Shapiro's primary band. Deadpan (E=4) to confrontation (E=6). The restraint loosens.
McKenna's primary band. Pop-punk catchiness to garage rawness. Same energy, different texture.
Hardly Art 2/4. Surf reverb mid-streak. Quiet center between indie and punk.
Anti-DCFC: raw, fast, loud, feminist, lo-fi. Same neighborhood, opposite aesthetics.
